lines.text: Oh, say were you ever in Rio Grande?
Way, oh, Rio!
It's there that the river runs down golden sand
And we're bound for the Rio Grande!
Then away, boys, away!
Way, oh, Rio!
Sing fare ye well, my pretty young girls
And we're bound for the Rio Grande!
Our ship went sailing out over the bar
Way, oh, Rio!
We pointed her nose for the southern star
And we're bound for the Rio Grande!
Then away, boys, away!
Way, oh, Rio!
Sing fare ye well, my pretty young girls
And we're bound for the Rio Grande!
Goodbye to Sally and goodbye to Sue
Way, oh, Rio!
And you who are listening, goodbye to you
And we're bound for the Rio Grande!
Then away, boys, away!
Way, oh, Rio!
So it's pack up your donkey and get under way
And we're bound for the Rio Grande!
Way, oh, Rio!
We're bound for the Rio Grande!
And we're bound for the Rio Grande...
